item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-49290 - Docker
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-49290 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Slopsmith is a self-contained web application for browsing, playing, and practicing Rocksmith 2014 Custom DLC (CDLC). Prior to 0.2.9-alpha.5, a path-traversal vulnerability in Slopsmith's archive extractors allows an attacker to write arbitrary files outside the extraction directory by supplying a crafted PSARC or sloppak archive. With the default Docker configuration (running as root) and the ability to drop a file...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-49290

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] Hackers Exploit Gravity SMTP WordPress Plugin Vulnerability - Security Boulevard
item.description:
💣 Hackers Exploit Gravity SMTP WordPress Plugin Vulnerability - Security Boulevard
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo WordPress. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxQb2pRclIzZzVneEZrRWFiOVJHSjBhSElnWWs5cFhJLV9fNFFBV0R0N1RZUUhSNlc2WmRXRTItUFZOc0dabjU5QzFWM3VMRkwzWExxNHBGOHpOYTJHVm5QYU80TzA2aXdDUEZwRjNTS2RQTVctTWtJWU5wMm16UDRsV08zd2RVOERVMS1NeEpnUFlGNmJva3dRaWVDd1EyVk0?oc=5

item.title: [Segurança] Unpatchable 'usbliter8' Exploit Breaks Apple A12 and A13 SecureROM Boot Chain
item.description:
💣 Unpatchable 'usbliter8' Exploit Breaks Apple A12 and A13 SecureROM Boot Chain
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Security researchers at Paradigm Shift have published a working exploit, dubbed usbliter8, that achieves arbitrary code execution inside the SecureROM of Apple's A12 and A13 chips. That code is burned into the silicon at manufacture. Affected devices will carry this flaw for as long as they stay in use.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/unpatchable-usbliter8-exploit-breaks.html

item.title: [Segurança] New Prinz Eugen ransomware prioritizes recent files for encryption
item.description:
📰 New Prinz Eugen ransomware prioritizes recent files for encryption
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer

Resumo:

item.title: [Segurança] Texas govt data breach exposes over 3 million driver’s licenses
item.description:
📰 Texas govt data breach exposes over 3 million driver’s licenses
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Texas Parks and Wildlife Department (TPWD) disclosed a data breach at its license system vendor that exposed personal information for more than three million individuals.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/texas-govt-data-breach-exposes-over-3-million-drivers-licenses/
